task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction between Erlotinib and Amiodarone
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app screen shows the interaction result specifically for Erlotinib and Amiodarone, displaying a color code.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction between Afatinib and Amiodarone
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app screen shows the interaction result specifically for Afatinib and Amiodarone, displaying a color code.

task_completion.description: Check the interaction between Osimertinib and Amiodarone
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app screen shows the interaction result specifically for Osimertinib and Amiodarone, displaying a color code.

task_completion.description: Create or open the target markdown file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing the creation or editing of the file at '/sdcard/egfr_amiodarone_comparison.md'.

task_completion.description: Write the summary table with the required data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The markdown file contains a formatted table with columns for Cancer Drug, Co-medication, and Interaction Color, populated with Erlotinib, Afatinib, Osimertinib, and Amiodarone.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the specific app's interface to find the interactions, rather than searching the web or hallucinating the answers.

integrity.description: Agent used valid interaction colors from the app
integrity.visual_evidence: The colors recorded in the markdown table must be one of the verified app colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Grey/Gray).

integrity.description: Agent did not use a pre-computed script to bypass the app
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not execute a single script that instantly generates the markdown file without first checking the app for the specific drug interactions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app uses a specific traffic light color system for drug interactions: Red (contraindicated), Orange (potential interaction requiring monitoring), Yellow (weak interaction), Green (no significant interaction), and Grey (insufficient data). The agent must check the interactions between the co-medication Amiodarone and three specific EGFR inhibitors: Erlotinib, Afatinib, and Osimertinib. All three have documented serious interactions with Amiodarone in reality. The final output must be a markdown table located at /sdcard/egfr_amiodarone_comparison.md.
